tick_tock.last_session_work: tick: url-dissect — URL Dissector & Analyzer (component breakdown, encoding audit, relative resolver, bulk extract). All tests pass, eval_bugs clean except known false-positive setTimeout warnings.
tick_tock.next_action: Tock — alternate flagship from scribe, so next is deck. Read deck_roadmap.md for priorities.

tick_queue_approved.name: cron-explain
tick_queue_approved.idea: Cron expression explainer — paste any 5-field or 6-field cron expression, get plain-English description, color-coded field breakdown, next 10 scheduled run times with relative display, and an interactive builder
tick_queue_approved.rationale: Devs write cron jobs constantly. Offline PWA fills the gap left by crontab.guru. Pure date-math in JS, zero deps, tight scope.

tick_queue_approved.name: unicode-char
tick_queue_approved.idea: Unicode Character Inspector — paste any text, get character-by-character breakdown with codepoint, name, category, UTF-8/16 bytes, HTML entity, CSS/JSON escape; suspicious-character panel flagging zero-width spaces, BOM, invisible separators, homoglyphs
tick_queue_approved.rationale: Every dev hits invisible-character bugs. Security angle (homoglyph/invisible-char warnings) differentiates it. Zero external deps.

tick_queue_approved.name: ip-cidr
tick_queue_approved.idea: IP/CIDR Calculator & Subnet Analyzer — network address, broadcast, mask, wildcard, host count, binary bitmask; Is-IP-in-range checker; subnet splitter; bulk comparison
tick_queue_approved.rationale: Cloud/backend/devops engineers deal with CIDR blocks every day. Pure 32-bit bitwise integer math in JS, zero deps.

tick_queue_approved.name: port-ref
tick_queue_approved.idea: Well-Known Port Quick-Reference — type a port or service name, get IANA service, protocol, privilege boundary warning (<1024), security flag; bulk annotation from docker-compose / k8s manifests
tick_queue_approved.rationale: DevOps engineers consult port numbers constantly. Pure JS static lookup, PWA, tight scope.
